name: Detective Agency Gray Tie 2 - Collector's Edition
short_description: The second part of the detective saga! Help Amanda find the stolen masterpiece in France. Explore mysterious locations, find hidden objects and solve puzzles. The Collector's Edition includes 20 mini-games and additional locations!
detailed_description:
Detective Agency "Gray Tie": The Mystery of the Stolen Masterpiece

Professional detectives Amanda and her assistant are back to investigate a new mysterious crime! This time you'll travel to France, where the famous artist Giovanni Rosen will ask for your help - his greatest creation, a masterpiece painting, has been stolen.

Your investigation will begin in the artist's cozy studio but will quickly lead you into a world of secret deals and cunning criminals. You'll visit an underground black market where you'll discover special devices used by thieves. The trail will lead you to an old observatory keeping its secrets, and even to a bustling TV studio where the main clue is hidden. Be careful - at every step you'll face traps set by the cunning villain.

Collector's Edition Features

Dive deeper into the story with exclusive content that expands the adventure:

• 8 additional locations for item searches and investigation
• A total of 20 new mini-games - 8 in the main collection and 12 additional for true puzzle lovers
• Collect evidence and expand your collection of proofs
• A collection of desktop wallpapers
• Original game soundtrack

Join the investigation and become part of this exciting detective story!

Uncover all the secrets and see the case through to the end! When the truth is revealed and the masterpiece returned to its rightful owner, you'll be welcomed at a ceremonial event in Paris where your contribution to solving the crime will be honored with a special award. Giovanni Rosen will personally thank you for your help, and the "Gray Tie" Detective Agency will gain international recognition.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German
*languages with full audio support
